items.front: 9-3-1: Five exceptions to SUA/ATCAA/ALTRV separation procedures
items.back: 1) Pilot has using agency permission. 2) Using agency tells ATC. 3) Airspace released to controlling agency. 4) Aircraft on approved ALTRV (except ATCAA). 5) Offshore/oceanic per Ch 8. Also: Alert Areas/CFAs always excluded.

items.front: 9-3-2: SUA altitude separation for nonparticipating aircraft
items.back: At least 500 ft above/below upper/lower limit (above FL 290: 1,000 ft).

items.front: 9-3-2: SUA radar separation from peripheral boundary
items.back: 3 miles (FL 600+: 6 miles). Exception: security/hazard areas and space launch ALTRVs — keep clear.

items.front: 9-3-2: THA crossing angles for space launch/reentry
items.back: Approved routing: 30-150° from launch course. Crossing courses: 45-135° from launch course.
At least 500 ft above upper limit or below lower limit. Exception: certain security/hazard P/R areas — no buffer required if identified by facility mgmt.
Comply with Using Agency instructions/clearances + provide separation between transiting aircraft. If unable to comply: use 9-3-2 minima.
